---
title: "Partial Differential Equations I: Classical and Weak Solutions"
subtitle: "CORE-009 | Core Mathematics — Year 2"
description: "PDEs are the mathematical language of spatially extended systems: diffusion, wave propagation, fluid flow, electrostatics, population spread, and more. This course covers classical theory, weak solutions, and variational methods."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Partial Differential Equations I: Classical and Weak Solutions

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
